Z1.description: Active Recovery — Very light effort, warm-up and cool-down. Fully aerobic, no fatigue accumulation.

Z2.description: Endurance — Easy aerobic base work. Conversational pace, the bulk of long run and easy ride volume.

Z3.description: Tempo — Comfortably hard. Marathon to half-marathon effort. Sustained aerobic work.

Z4.description: Threshold — Lactate threshold effort. 10km to half-marathon race pace. Sustainable for 20-60 minutes.

Z5.description: VO2max — Very hard. 5km race pace and above. Sustainable only for short intervals of 3-8 minutes.
